personality_one_liner: A clean, trustworthy, and user-friendly medical platform with a touch of warmth brought by the Pingo mascot.

spacing.rule: Generous iOS-native padding. Cards never flush to screen edge. Sticky primary CTAs with safe-area clearance.

do's: Use for bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind
Use for sticky headers and bottom-sheet headers
Use for featured doctor cards over brand-tinted or photo backdrops
dont's: Do not use on body content, list rows, or form inputs
Do not use multiple glass effects layered on top of each other

screens.name: Patient App - Onboarding
screens.purpose: Introduce the platform with the Pingo mascot and guide to login/register.
screens.layout: Full-bleed background with a gradient scrim. Display the Pingo mascot image prominently. Bottom 1/3 contains welcome text and a sticky primary CTA ('Começar') using brandPrimary.

screens.name: Patient App - Home Dashboard
screens.purpose: Central hub for patients to view upcoming appointments, search specialties, and access quick actions.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders for cards and profile area
states.empty: Illustration of Pingo saying 'Nenhuma consulta agendada' with 'Agendar Consulta' CTA

screens.layout: Header with user greeting and notification icon. A 'featured card' with glassmorphism for the next upcoming appointment. A horizontal scroll of 'Especialidades' (tinted icon containers). A 'Consultar Agora' floating action card or pinned section.

screens.name: Patient App - Doctor Search & Profile
screens.purpose: Find and view a doctor's profile to book an appointment.

states.empty: Pingo with magnifying glass 'Nenhum médico encontrado'

screens.layout: Search bar with filters at the top (glass sticky header). List of doctor cards containing their photo, name, specialty, and rating. The Doctor Profile screen has a large hero image of the doctor with a gradient scrim, stats, 'Sobre', and a sticky 'Agendar Consulta' CTA at the bottom.

screens.name: Patient App - Video Consultation

states.error: Call failed message with reconnect button

screens.layout: Full-screen video of the doctor. Small PIP (picture-in-picture) floating view of the patient. A bottom floating glass bar containing controls: Mute, Camera Off, Chat, and End Call (red button).

screens.name: Doctor App - Home Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of today's agenda, patient queue, and earnings.

states.empty: Pingo holding a calendar 'Nenhum paciente para hoje'

screens.layout: Header with 'Resumo de Hoje'. Top metrics cards (Consultas, Ganhos). A vertical list of today's appointments (Patient queue) showing time, patient photo, and a 'Iniciar Chamada' button for the current one.

screens.name: Doctor App - Patient Record (Prontuário)
screens.purpose: View patient history and write prescriptions during or after a call.
screens.layout: Sticky header with patient info. Tabs for 'Histórico', 'Prescrições', 'Exames'. Floating action button (FAB) to 'Nova Prescrição' or 'Solicitar Exame'.

pingo_mascot.alt: Pingo mascot in doctor lab coat

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop two separate experiences (Patient App and Doctor App). Navigation should route appropriately based on user type.
The UI is strictly in Portuguese-BR.
Use the Pingo mascot image prominently on the Onboarding, Splash, and Empty States for both apps.
The color palette utilizes the blue and orange from Pingo as primary and secondary brand colors, breaking the general ban because the brief explicitly requires matching the mascot's colors.
Ensure the video call screen utilizes a full-screen layout with safe-area spacing and a floating glass control bar at the bottom.
Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all typography, maintaining clean and accessible readability for medical information.
Follow iOS-Native Clean principles: generous spacing, clear hierarchy, radius 'md', and use glassmorphism for sticky headers and tab bars.
Implement haptics on primary actions like 'Agendar Consulta', 'Iniciar Chamada', and tab bar presses.
